classes.name: Techmarine
notes: [CONFLICT] Game8 missing / outdated: class absent from Game8 class list.

weapons.name: Auto Bolt Rifle
weapons.description_short: Auto Bolt Rifle Codename arifle_auto_bolt_rifle Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Tactical Techmarine The Auto Bolt Rifle is a primary weapon available for the Tactical and Techmarine classes.

weapons.name: Bolt Carbine
weapons.description_short: Bolt Carbine Codename smg_bolt_carbine brifle_marksman_bolt_carbine Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Tactical Vanguard Sniper The Bolt Carbine is a primary weapon available for the Tactical , Sniper and Vanguard [ note 1 ] class.
notes: [CONFLICT] Fandom!=Game8 classes: Fandom=[Tactical, Vanguard, Sniper] Game8=[Tactical, Sniper]

weapons.name: Bolt Pistol
weapons.description_short: Bolt Pistol Codename hgun_bolt_pistol Slot Secondary Type Bolters Available Class Tactical Assault Vanguard Bulwark Sniper Heavy Techmarine Bolt Pistol is a secondary weapon available for the Tactical , Assault , Vanguard , Bulwark , Sniper , Heavy and Techmarine class.
notes: [CONFLICT] Fandom!=Game8 classes: Fandom=[Tactical, Assault, Vanguard, Bulwark, Sniper, Heavy, Techmarine] Game8=[Tactical, Assault, Vanguard, Bulwark, Sniper, Heavy]

weapons.name: Bolt Rifle
weapons.description_short: Bolt Rifle Codename arifle_bolt_rifle Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Tactical Techmarine The Bolt Rifle is a primary weapon available for the Tactical and Techmarine classes.

weapons.name: Bolt Sniper Rifle
weapons.description_short: Bolt Sniper Rifle Codename brifle_bolt_sniper_rifle Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Sniper Bolt Sniper Rifle is a primary weapon available for the Sniper class.

weapons.name: Chainsword
weapons.description_short: Chainsword Codename chainsword Slot Melee Available Class Tactical Assault Vanguard Bulwark Chainsword is a melee weapon available for the Tactical , Assault , Vanguard and Bulwark class.

weapons.name: Combat Knife
weapons.description_short: Combat Knife Codename combat_knife Slot Melee Available Class Tactical Vanguard Sniper Techmarine Combat Knife is a melee weapon available for the Vanguard , Sniper and Tactical [ note 1 ] and Techmarine class.
notes: [CONFLICT] Fandom!=Game8 classes: Fandom=[Tactical, Vanguard, Sniper, Techmarine] Game8=[Vanguard, Sniper]

weapons.name: Heavy Bolt Pistol
weapons.description_short: Heavy Bolt Pistol Codename hgun_heavy_bolt_pistol Slot Secondary Type Bolters Available Class Tactical Assault Vanguard Bulwark Sniper Heavy Techmarine Heavy Bolt Pistol is a secondary weapon available for the Assault , Tactical [ note 1 ] , Vanguard [ note 1 ] , Bulwark [ note 1 ] , Sniper [ note 1 ] , Heavy [ note 1 ] and Techmarine class.
notes: [CONFLICT] Fandom!=Game8 classes: Fandom=[Tactical, Assault, Vanguard, Bulwark, Sniper, Heavy, Techmarine] Game8=[Assault]

weapons.name: Heavy Bolt Rifle
weapons.description_short: Heavy Bolt Rifle Codename arifle_heavy_bolt_rifle Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Tactical Heavy (PvE only) Techmarine The Heavy Bolt Rifle is a primary weapon available for the Tactical , Heavy [ note 1 ] and Techmarine classes.
notes: [CONFLICT] Fandom!=Game8 classes: Fandom=[Tactical, Heavy, Techmarine] Game8=[Tactical]

weapons.name: Heavy Bolter
weapons.description_short: Heavy Bolter Codename hwpn_support_heavy_bolter Slot Primary Type Heavy Weaponry Bolters Available Class Heavy Heavy Bolter is a primary weapon available for the Heavy class.

weapons.name: Heavy Firearms Melee
weapons.description_short: Heavy Firearms Melee Slot Melee Type Heavy Weaponry Available Class Heavy The Heavy class can't equip melee weapons so he have to strike with his heavy firearms instead. These melee attacks are the same for every primary firearm Heavy equips. Using a higher quality version of a heavy firearm does not seem to increase the melee damage.
notes: [CONFLICT] Game8 missing / outdated: weapon absent from Game8 weapon list.

weapons.name: Heavy Plasma Incinerator
weapons.description_short: Heavy Plasma Incinerator Codename hwpn_support_plasma_incinerator Slot Primary Type Heavy Weaponry Energy Weapons Available Class Heavy Heavy Plasma Incinerator is a primary weapon available for the Heavy class.

weapons.name: Inferno Pistol
weapons.description_short: Inferno Pistol Codename hgun_inferno_pistol Slot Secondary Type Energy Weapons Available Class Assault Vanguard Sniper Heavy Techmarine The Inferno Pistol is a secondary weapon available for the Assault , Vanguard , Sniper , Heavy and Techmarine class.. It is a close-range thermal weapon similar to the Multi-Melta or Melta Rifle , but smaller.
notes: [CONFLICT] Game8 missing / outdated: weapon absent from Game8 weapon list.

weapons.name: Instigator Bolt Carbine
weapons.description_short: Instigator Bolt Carbine Codename brifle_instigator_bolt_carbine Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Vanguard Sniper The Instigator Bolt Carbine is a primary weapon available for the Vanguard and Sniper [ note 1 ] class.

weapons.name: Las Fusil
weapons.description_short: Las Fusil Codename hwpn_las_fusil Slot Primary Type Energy Weapons Available Class Sniper Las Fusil is a primary weapon available for the Sniper class.

weapons.name: Melta Rifle
weapons.description_short: Melta Rifle Codename shotgun_meltagun Slot Primary Type Energy Weapons Available Class Tactical Vanguard (PvE only) Melta Rifle is a primary weapon available for the Tactical and Vanguard [ note 1 ] class.

weapons.name: Multi-Melta
weapons.description_short: Multi-Melta Codename hwpn_support_heavy_meltagun Slot Primary Type Heavy Weaponry Energy Weapons Available Class Heavy Multi-Melta is a primary weapon available for the Heavy class.

weapons.name: Neo-Volkite Pistol
weapons.description_short: Neo-Volkite Pistol Codename hgun_volkite_pistol Slot Secondary Type Energy Weapons Available Class Assault Vanguard Bulwark Techmarine The Neo-Volkite Pistol is a secondary weapon available for the Assault , Vanguard , Bulwark and Techmarine class..
notes: [CONFLICT] Game8 missing / outdated: weapon absent from Game8 weapon list.

weapons.name: Occulus Bolt Carbine
weapons.description_short: Occulus Bolt Carbine Codename smg_occulus_bolt_carbine Slot Primary Type Bolters Available Class Vanguard Techmarine The Occulus Bolt Carbine is a primary weapon available for the Vanguard and Techmarine class.

weapons.name: Omnissiah Axe
weapons.description_short: Omnissiah Axe Codename power_halberd Slot Melee Available Class Techmarine Omnissiah Axe is a melee weapon available for the Techmarine class. According to the Xbox News Dive, it will be a crowd-control weapon that can "take on large groups of enemies with wide swipes of their Omnissian Axe"
notes: [CONFLICT] Game8 missing / outdated: weapon absent from Game8 weapon list.

weapons.description_short: Plasma Incinerator Codename pwpn_plasma_exterminator Slot Primary Type Energy Weapons Available Class Tactical Techmarine Plasma Incinerator is a primary weapon available for the Tactical and Techmarine class.

weapons.name: Plasma Pistol
weapons.description_short: Plasma Pistol Codename hgun_plasma_pistol Slot Secondary Type Energy Weapons Available Class Tactical Assault Bulwark Heavy Techmarine Plasma Pistol is a secondary weapon available for the Bulwark and Heavy , Tactical [ note 1 ] , Assault [ note 1 ] and Techmarine class.
notes: [CONFLICT] Fandom!=Game8 classes: Fandom=[Tactical, Assault, Bulwark, Heavy, Techmarine] Game8=[Bulwark, Heavy]

weapons.name: Power Sword
weapons.description_short: Power Sword Codename power_sword Slot Melee Available Class Assault Bulwark Techmarine Power Sword is a melee weapon available for the Bulwark and Assault [ note 1 ] and Techmarine class.

Tactical.description: Your Primary Weapon deals 10% more Damage, but your Secondary Weapon deals 10% less Damage
After a perfectly timed Parry or Dodge, you deal 10% more Melee and Gun Strike Damage, do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back for 10 seconds
After a Finisher, the equipped Ranged Weapon reloads automatically, and your Primary Weapon deals 20% more Damage for 10 seconds
Equipment Charge is restored by 1 for all Squad Members. Cooldown is 60 seconds.
Scanning an Extremis - or Terminus -level enemy restores Auspex Scan's Charge by 50%
A perfectly timed Parry or Block gives the parried enemy a mark from Auspex Scan
When Auspex Scan is in cooldown, Melee Damage increases by 25%
Enemies marked by Auspex Scan cannot call for reinforcements and automatically explode upon attempting to do so
When the Plasma Incinerator is 30% Overheated, its Damage increases by 40% and their Charged Shots use 1 less energy
After a Gun Strike, Ranged Damage increases by 25% for 5 seconds
Weapon Spread and Recoil is reduced by 20% and Ranged Damage against Terminus -level enemies is increased by 20%
Ranged Damage increases by 15% for all Squad Members
The Mark from Auspex Scan lasts 8 seconds longer (base: 8 ), but Auspex Scan ignores Minoris -level enemies
Scanning any 10 enemies or 3 Majoris -level or higher enemies with one Auspex Scan restores Equipment Charge by 1
Enemies marked by Auspex Scan take an additional 75% Damage, but the mark's Duration is reduced by 4 seconds (base: 8 )
A Melee Finisher additionally deals area-of-effect Damage that scales with difficulty in a 10 -metre radius. Cooldown is 90 seconds. [ note 1 ]
Bolt Weapons penetrate 1 more enemy
After switching Weapons, your Secondary Weapon does 25% more Damage. The Effect lasts until reloading or switching back to your Primary Weapon.

Killing a Majoris -level or higher enemy restores your Primary Weapon's Ammo by 1 magazine. For Primary Weapons that doesn't reload, 20% of maximum Ammo capacity is restored instead. Cannot exceed maximum Ammo capacity. Cooldown is 30 seconds. [ note 2 ]
All Squad Members restore 30% more Contested Health from Ranged Damage
Enemies marked by Auspex Scan take 75% more Equipment Damage
Enemies marked by Auspex Scan take an additional 75% Damage, but Auspex Scan's radius is reduced by 25%
Auspex Scan zone lasts 60% longer, and enemies marked by Auspex Scan take an additional 120% Damage, but they lose the mark when they leave the scanned area
A Headshot will instantly kill a Majoris - or Extremis -level enemy marked by Auspex Scan. Cooldown is 120 seconds.

Assault.description: Damage from Melee Attacks executed while sprinting or dashing increases by 100% . Deals area-of-effect Damage within a 7 -metre radius. Cooldown is 5 seconds.
Secondary Weapon's Damage increases by 20%
While performing Charged Attacks, you take 25% less Health Damage do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back
All Squad Members' Abilities recharge 15% faster [ 2 ]
Ground Pound's Damage increases by 25%
Jump Pack Dash deals damage that scales with difficulty to enemies along its trajectory and always works as a Perfect Dodge when dodging an attack [ note 1 ] [ 3 ]
After a Finisher, Ground Pound deals 25% more Damage for 10 seconds
Any use of Jump Pack reloads the equipped Ranged weapon and increases Ranged Damage for by 50% for 10 seconds
Damage of Charged Attacks increases by 25%
Contested Health fades 50% more slowly
Melee Damage increases by 15% against Majoris - or Extremis -level enemies
All Squad Members deal 20% more Melee Damage against Extremis - and Terminus -level enemies
Hitting an enemy with Jump Pack's Dash attack ability restore by 1 charger. Cooldown 10 seconds.
Jump Pack recharges 20% faster [ 2 ]
A fully prepared Ground Pound deals 20% more Damage, but preparation time increases by 25%

Jump Pack Leap deals Damage to enemies near the takeoff area. Enemies within 1 -metre take Damage based on Difficulty Level. After 1 -metre the Damage starts to drop-off and does 0 Damage at 5 -metres. Can hit up to 20 enemies. [ note 1 ]
Non-Finisher Gun Strikes also restore 1 Armour Segment
Killing 7 enemies within 6 seconds restores Equipment Charge by 1 . Cooldown is 90 seconds. [ note 2 ]
Enemies hit by Damage from Melee Attacks executed while sprinting or dashing take 25% more Damage for 5 seconds
All Squad Members deal 30% more Gun Strike Damage
Ground Pound deals 100% more Damage, but its radius is reduced by 50%
A Ground Pound kill restores Jump Pack's Charge by 10%
After a perfectly timed Dodge using a Jump Pack Dash, you deal 30% more Damage for 10 seconds
A perfectly timed Dodge using a Jump Pack Dash restores Jump pack's Ability Charge

Vanguard.description: Killing an enemy from a distance of more than 30 } metres restores Ability Charge by 5%
Perfect Parry and Perfect Block windows increase by 50%
When your Ranged Weapon's magazine is empty, Melee Damage increases by 25%
All Squad Members deal 15% more Melee Damage
After a Diving Kick, you take 40% less Ranged Damage for 10 seconds
Performing a Finisher with the Grapnel Launcher deals Damage that scales with difficulty to enemies within 5 -metres. [ note 3 ]
After a perfectly timed Parry, Block or Dodge, you take 20% less Health Damage for 5 seconds

Grapnel Launcher can activate a Finisher not only on Incapacitated enemies but also on those who have less than 33% (except Terminus level), and Performing a Finisher with the Grapnel Launcher fully restores its Ability Charge
Melee Damage increases by 10% against Majoris -level and higher enemies
You take 20% less Ranged Damage
Killing 7 enemies within 5 seconds restores Equipment Charge by 1 . Cooldown is 90 seconds. [ note 4 ]
Melee Finishers of Extremis - or Terminus -level additionally restore Health by 30% for any Squad Member
Diving Kick additionally deals 50% of its main Damage in a 5 -metre radius [ note 5 ]
After a Ranged kill of a Majoris -level or higher enemy, Diving Kick's Damage increases by 130% . Cooldown is 15 seconds.
When Grapnel Launcher is in cooldown, Weapon Damage increases by 15%
Take Lethal Damage restores all Armour instead of Incapacitating you. Cooldown is 120 seconds.
After a perfectly timed Parry, Block or Dodge, you do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back for 10 seconds
When your Armour is fully Depleted, you take 25% less Health Damage for 10 seconds
When your Health is less than 50% , your Perfect Dodge window is doubled
All Squad Members can restore Ability Charge by 15% by performing Finishers on Majoris -level or higher enemies
Diving Kick deals 10% more Damage and additionally deals damage that scales with difficulty to enemies on the way to the Grapnel Launcher's target
Enemies hit by Diving kick take 15% more Ranged Damage for 10 seconds
Grapnel Launcher recharges 20% faster
Melee kills of Majoris -level or higher enemies restore Health by 5% [ note 6 ]

Bulwark.description: When your Armour is fully depleted, you take 25% less Health Damage for 10 seconds
When you Block a Ranged Attack, enemies within a 10 -metre radius take the Damage instead
A perfectly timed Parry or Block creates a Shock area for 5 seconds. Cooldown is 30 seconds.
Every 30 seconds, all Squad Members automatically restore 1 Armour Segment
The banner deals Damage that scales with difficulty over time to enemies within its area of effect [ note 1 ]
Shield Bash deals 200% more Damage. Thunder Hammer Pommel Smash deals 100% more damage and deals area-of-effect Damage within a 7 meter radius. Cooldown is 5 seconds.
When the banner is activated, it revives Incapacitated Squad Members within its area of effect
When your Armour is depleted, a reserve Shock Grenade automatically detonated at your position. Cooldown is 45 seconds.
A perfectly timed Parry deals area-of-effect Damage that scales with difficulty within a 5 -metre radius. [ note 2 ]
Enemies in a Shock area take 25% more Damage
When your Health is less than 50% , you take 30% less Health Damage
Contested Health fades 50% more slowly for all Squad Members
The banner restores Armour 300% faster, but its Duration is reduced to 10 seconds [ note 3 ]
All Squad Members within the banner's area of effect take 20% less Damage, and the banner lasts 20% longer
After a Shield Bash or Thunder Hammer Pommel Smash, Melee Damage increases by 15% , you do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back for 10 seconds
A perfectly timed Parry instantly Incapacitates a Majoris - or Extremis -level enemy. Cooldown is 90 seconds.
After a Shield Bash or Thunder Hammer Pommel Smash, Melee Damage increases by 30% for 10 seconds
If you are surrounded by 5 or more enemies, you take 25% less Damage from Ranged Attacks
Non-Finisher Gun Strikes restore 1 Armour Segment
All Squad members take 20% less Health Damage from Extremis - and Terminus -level enemies
Shield Bash knocks enemies back and makes them lose control for a longer period of time
When the banner is activated, all Squad Members regain maximum Contested Health, but it recharges 50% slower [ note 4 ]
All Squad Members within the banner's area of effect deal 20% more Damage
If you have Armour remaining, you do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back

Sniper.description: Shots will penetrate enemy Block Stances, dealing 50% of the usual Damage
The maximum amount of Ammo you can carry increases by 10%
Weapon Spread and Recoil are reduced by 20% and Ranged Damage against Terminus -level enemies is increased by 15% for Bolt Sniper Rifles and Stalker Bolt Rifles
Headshot Damage increases by 10% for all Squad Members
Manually activating Camo Cloak removes negative Status Effects and restores all Contested Health
When you are reviving a Squad Member, Camo Cloak hides you and the Squad Member for 5 seconds without spending Charge.
When Camo Cloak deactivates, you take 20% less Health Damage, do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits, and cannot be knocked back for 10 seconds
After a perfectly timed Dodge, Camo Cloak automatically activates without spending Charge for 5 seconds. Cooldown is 30 seconds.
Melee Damage increases by 20% against Majoris -level and higher enemies
Remaining stationary for 2 seconds increases your Ranged Weapons' Damage by 20%
Bolt Carbines reload 20% faster, and their Weapon Spread and Recoil are reduced by 15%
Weapon Spread is reduced by 25% and Ranged Damage against Extremis - and Terminus -level enemies is increased by 15% for all Squad Members
Camo Cloak increases movement speed by 20% , and manually activating Camo Cloak automatically reloads Ranged Weapons. This effect lasts 5 seconds after deactivation.
The first Ranged Attack that breaks Camo Cloak deals 75% more Damage
After performing an attack that breaks Camo Cloak, you remain hidden for 2 seconds
When you receive Lethal Damage, Camo Cloak automatically activates without spending Charge and you become Invulnerable for 5 seconds. Cooldown is 180 seconds.
You revive Squad members 30% faster
Reloading while having Low Ammo or manually activating Camo Cloak increases Melee Damage by 25% for 10 seconds
Killing more than 1 enemy with one shot from a Las Fusil restores its charge by 1
A Headshot kill restores Ability Charge by 10% for any Squad Member
A Headshot kill restores Camo Cloak's Charge by 5%
The first Melee Attack that breaks Camo Cloak deals 150% more Damage
When your Camo Cloak deactivates, it startles and slows down nearby enemies for 10 seconds. They will temporarily lose control or get knocked back. Cooldown is 15 seconds.
Performing 3 consecutive Headshots restores Equipment Charge by 1 . Cooldown is 30 seconds.

Heavy.description: Killing 10 enemies within 5 seconds restores 1 Armour Segments. Cooldown is 15 seconds. [ note 2 ]
When a Ranged Weapon is 50% Overheated or you have 50% ammo in Magazine, Ranged Damage increases by 15%
Melee Damage increases by 30%
All Squad Members take 25% less Damage from Ranged Attacks
After Iron Halo deactivates, you take 20% less Health Damage for 10 seconds
Iron Halo's Durability increases by 20%
Reviving a Squad Member fully restores Iron Halo's Charge and all Armour Segments
When active, Iron Halo deals Damage that scales with difficulty over time to all enemies within 5 metres [ note 3 ]
Killing 5 or more enemies with one shot from a Multi-Melta restores Ammo by 1
Health increases by 30%
When Iron Halo is active, all Squad Members within 10 metres deal 10% more Ranged Damage
Ammo Capacity for all Squad Members' Weapons increases by 25%
Killing 7 enemies within 5 seconds restores Equipment Charge. Cooldown is 90 seconds. [ note 2 ]
Iron Halo recharges 20% faster, but its Durability is reduced by 25%
When Iron Halo is in cooldown, Ranged Damage increases by 15%
If both of your Squad Members are Incapacitated or grabbed, your Primary Weapon will not Overheat and you deal 15% more Damage
When your Primary Weapon is out of Ammo, killing 7 enemies within 6 seconds restores Ammo Reserve by 20% . Cooldown is 30 seconds. [ note 2 ]
While in Heavy Stance, dealing Damage restores 15% more Contested Health, you do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits, and you cannot be knocked back but you will not be able to move
After switching Weapons, your Secondary Weapon does 20% more Damage. The Effect lasts until reloading or switching back to your Primary Weapon.
Reviving a Squad Member restores them to full Health
When Iron Halo expends all its energy, 1 Armour Segment is restored for all Squad Members
Iron Halo loses energy 20% more slowly
When Iron Halo expends all of its energy, enemies in a 10 -metre radius take significant Damage that scales with difficulty [ note 3 ]
When Iron Halo is active, all Squad Members within 20 metres regenerate Ability Charge 50% faster

Techmarine.description: After using Equipment, your Ranged Damage increases by 15% for 10 seconds
Damage from Charged Melee Attacks increases by 20%
Damage from Equipment increases by 35%
All Squad Members within 15 metres of an active Tarantula Sentry Gun take 25% less Damage and deal 15% more Damage
Enemies hit by the Servo-Gun take 15% more Damage for 10 seconds
Servo-Gun recharges 15% faster
After using the Servo-Gun, Melee Damage increases by 35% for 10 seconds
Killing or incapacitating Majoris -level or higher enemies with the Servo- Gun regenerates its Ability Charge by 100% . Cooldown is 90 seconds.
The Servo-Gun now locks on to a single target and fires powerful precision shots
Enemies damaged by Equipment take 25% more Damage for 10 seconds
After a Finisher, your Melee Weapon deals 20% more Damage for 15 seconds
All Squad Members fully regenerate their Armour and gain 1 additional Armour Segment when using Medicae Stimms
While the Servo-Gun is active, you do not lose control upon taking Heavy Hits and you cannot be knocked back
Tarantula Sentry Gun Damage increases by 30% and Ammo increases by 50%
Killing enemies with the Servo-Gun restores 1 Armor Segment. Cooldown is 30 seconds.
The Servo-Gun marks a zone and automatically attacks enemies that enter it, using 50% less energy per shot [ 1 ]
The Servo-Gun now guards a targeted area and fires exploding Plasma projectiles at enemies that enter it
After a Perfect Parry or Perfect Block, you take 15% less Damage from Ranged Attack for 10 seconds
Ranged Damage at ranges greater than 20 metres increases by 25%
All Squad Members gain 1 additional Equipment (except Melta Bomb)
Servo-Gun recharge rate increases by 15% when you are near a Tarantula Sentry Gun
Killing an enemy with the Servo-Gun restores 1 Equipment. Cooldown is 75 seconds.
Servo-Gun only targets Majoris -level or higher enemies and deals 20% more Damage when the target is more than 20 metres away
Servo-Gun shots set enemies on fire
